subject: Computer Networking
title: How WhatsApp Works
description: A quick win: understand How WhatsApp Works.

hook.text: Two billion users send 100 billion messages daily on WhatsApp. How does it work under the hood?

buildup.text: WhatsApp uses the Signal protocol. Every message is end-to-end encrypted with unique keys per session.

discovery.text: Messages are stored on the server only until delivered. Once received, the server copy is deleted.

twist.text: Group chats use sender keys. One encryption operation reaches all members. Efficient but less secure than 1:1.

climax.text: WhatsApp Web mirrors your phone's session. The phone must stay connected to relay messages.

punchline.text: WhatsApp encrypts everything by default. Billions trust it daily.

quiz.question: What encryption protocol does WhatsApp use?
